overall.description: First-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city intersection from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring towering industrial buildings, massive digital billboards, and futuristic vehicles. The character walks across a distinctive orange-paved plaza while pedestrians and sci-fi cars move through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with transit stop

events.description: futuristic articulated bus begins moving left and away from the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the futuristic plaza toward the intersection center, approaching the parked transit bus

notable_agents.action: large futuristic articulated bus with purple decals stationary at the curb

entered.detail: large silver and blue transit bus with purple decals and multiple axles
massive illuminated screen displaying food advertisements on the left building
multi-story red and black industrial structure with prominent V-shaped logo
distinctive orange-brown paved ground with white striped crosswalk markings
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic cyberpunk plaza with distinctive orange paving. A large articulated transit bus sits parked on the left while towering industrial buildings rise on both sides. Digital billboards illuminate the left side as the camera walks forward through the open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection crossing approaching vehicle traffic

events.description: pedestrian wearing red cap passes close to camera from right to left, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: continuing across the open plaza toward the intersection center as a pedestrian passes closely by

notable_agents.action: person wearing red cap and dark clothing walking past the camera at close range

entered.detail: sleek blue sports car approaching the intersection from the distance

segments.scene_description: Having passed the transit bus, the camera moves deeper into the open intersection. A pedestrian in a red cap walks closely past the camera from right to left. In the distance, a futuristic blue sports car approaches the crossing area while the red industrial building remains prominent on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with active vehicle traffic

events.description: futuristic blue sports car drives across the intersection from right to left
dark gray sedan follows through the intersection, crossing the camera's path

agents.ego_description: crossing through the active intersection as multiple futuristic vehicles pass by from right to left

notable_agents.action: futuristic blue sports car driving across the intersection from right to left
dark gray angular sedan following the blue car through the crossing

entered.detail: dark gray sedan with angular cyberpunk design entering the intersection
black vehicle approaching the intersection from the right side

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows active traffic flowing through the intersection. The blue sports car crosses from right to left, followed by a gray sedan and other vehicles. The red industrial building looms closer on the right as the camera continues walking forward through the orange-paved crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk plaza that transitions from a quiet industrial corridor into a bustling city intersection. It begins on a distinctive orange-paved expanse, moving past a large articulated transit bus and towering industrial buildings illuminated by glowing digital billboards. As the camera advances deeper into the open space, a pedestrian in a red cap crosses the path from right to left while a futuristic blue sports car appears in the distance. The scene then shifts into the heart of the crossing, where the blue sports car and a gray sedan flow through the intersection in active traffic. Finally, the camera continues its forward momentum across the orange paving as the massive red industrial building on the right looms closer and more prominent.
